productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Georgina 2 Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Navy and pink striped sweater made of 98% cotton and 2% lycra, has long sleeves, round neck, cuffs and hemline in rib, velvet strip at inner back neck and small diamante logo on lower front Fit Regular Wash care Warm wash with light colours Do not use chlorine bleach Tumble dry Medium iron Keep warm with this sweater from arrow woman. Flattering horizontal stripes in bold pink and navy give a slimming effect and the neckline is wide enough to allow you to wear this sweater over a shirt making this a practical choice when the weather turns colder. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
